metadata.name: Scope an Audit of a New Business Acquisition

description: Following a recent acquisition, an internal audit manager plans an audit to review the integration process.

nodes.task_description: Review the acquisition's due diligence reports to identify key risks noted during the deal.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor identifies key risks related to the acquired company's IT systems and cultural integration.

nodes.task_description: Interview the head of the integration management office (IMO) to understand the integration plan and current status.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor gets an overview of the integration timeline and key milestones.

nodes.task_description: Draft an audit scope that focuses on the highest risk areas of the integration, such as IT systems migration and employee retention.

expected_outcome.value: A risk-based audit scope is developed and approved.
